fault_hypothesis: The overlap detection on line 67 incorrectly uses non-strict inequalities (`<=`, `>=`), which fails to identify touching intervals as conflicts. The correct logic should use strict inequalities (`<`, `>`) to reject windows that are adjacent to existing slots.

spec.expr: (any(not (b__1 <= s or a__1 >= e) for s, e in timeline)) == (any(not (b__1 < s or a__1 > e) for s, e in timeline))

constraints.intent: The buggy overlap check should yield the same result as a correct check using strict inequalities.

spec.expr: all(b__1 != s and a__1 != e for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: If no overlap is detected, then the new window must not be touching any existing slot.

spec.expr: all(result__1[i][1] < result__1[i+1][0] for i in range(len(result__1) - 1))

constraints.intent: The updated timeline must not contain any touching or overlapping slots after sorting.
